initial_candidates.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE monthly_inventory(product_id, mth, ending_inventory, min_required) AS (
  -- Base case: December 2018 inventory levels
  SELECT 
    i.product_id,
    201812 AS mth,
    i.qty AS ending_inventory,
    pm.qty_minimum AS min_required
  FROM inventory i
  JOIN product_minimums pm ON i.product_id = pm.product_id

  UNION ALL

  -- Recursive case: monthly adjustments through 2019
  SELECT 
    mi.product_id,
    mi.mth + 1 AS mth,
    CASE 
      WHEN mi.ending_inventory - COALESCE(ms.qty, 0) < mi.min_required 
      THEN mi.min_required  -- restock to minimum if below threshold
      ELSE mi.ending_inventory - COALESCE(ms.qty, 0)
    END AS ending_inventory,
    mi.min_required
  FROM monthly_inventory mi
  LEFT JOIN monthly_sales ms 
    ON mi.product_id = ms.product_id 
    AND ms.mth = mi.mth + 1
  WHERE mi.mth < 201912
)
SELECT 
  product_id,
  mth,
  ABS(ending_inventory - min_required) AS abs_diff
FROM (
  SELECT 
    product_id,
    mth,
    ending_inventory,
    min_required,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY ABS(ending_inventory - min_required)) AS rn
  FROM monthly_inventory
  WHERE mth BETWEEN 201901 AND 201912
) ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY product_id;

aggregation.selected_sql:

      THEN mi.min_required  -- restock to minimum if below threshold
